title: Workplace Coordinator
decision: SKIP — clerical/facilities-primary role per JD body (per submit-agent instruction: 'if clerical-primary per JD body, SKIP').
reasoning: The 'What you'll achieve' list is overwhelmingly reception + facilities/office-operations: greet all visitors, enforce Guest Policy sign-in, receive/distribute packages & mail, open/close the office, vendor management, kitchen stock, waste management, repairs & maintenance, office supplies, inventory/storage of food & beverage & office equipment, keep office clean and stocked, maintain seating plans with Space Planning.

Required qualifications are hands-on office-operations/customer-service: '1-2 years of direct customer service experience' + '2-3 years of office operations experience'; set schedule 9am-5pm Mon-Fri, fully in-office (SF HQ).

The employee-experience / events component is explicitly a SUPPORTING role ('Assist the Workplace Lead/Manager... in partnership with the Internal Events and the Employee engagement teams'), not ownership of EX programs.

RULE 0 (no fabrication): Jamie has NO facilities, reception, front-desk, office-operations, or direct customer-service experience in her ground-truth files. A truthful resume/cover cannot be built for this role's core requirements without misrepresenting her OD/program-management background as facilities/reception work. The honest action is to skip rather than inflate.
Distinct from the Asana Implementation / Customer-Enablement roles applied 5/30 (confirmed).
sponsor_status: Asana = confirmed sponsor (per orchestrator note); not a blocker. Skip is purely on role-fit/truthfulness grounds, NOT sponsorship.
no_hard_blocker_present: No explicit no-sponsorship / ITAR / clearance language in JD; salary band $54,000-$60,000 base posted.
